trans-unit.source: The following agent configurations use the deprecated 'mcp start' command. Update them?
trans-unit.target: 以下代理程式設定使用已棄用的 'mcp start' 命令。更新它們?

trans-unit.source: Run 'aspire agent init' to update configuration
trans-unit.target: 執行 'aspire agent init' 以更新設定

trans-unit.source: Update {0} config to use new 'agent mcp' command
trans-unit.target: 更新 {0} 設定以使用新的 'agent mcp' 命令
{0} 設定使用已淘汰的 'mcp start' 命令
管理 AI Agent 整合。

trans-unit.source: Initialize agent environment configuration for detected agents.
trans-unit.target: 為偵測到的代理程式初始化代理程式環境設定。

trans-unit.source: No options selected. Nothing to configure.
trans-unit.target: No options selected. Nothing to configure.

trans-unit.source: Where should skill files be installed? [dim](Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)[/]
trans-unit.target: Where should skill files be installed? [dim](Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)[/]

trans-unit.source: Which skills should be installed? [dim](Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)[/]
trans-unit.target: Which skills should be installed? [dim](Space to toggle, Enter to confirm)[/]

trans-unit.source: What would you like to configure? [dim](Enter to skip, Ctrl+C to cancel)[/]
trans-unit.target: What would you like to configure? [dim](Enter to skip, Ctrl+C to cancel)[/]

trans-unit.source: The configuration file '{0}' contains malformed JSON. Please fix the file manually and re-run the command.
trans-unit.target: The configuration file '{0}' contains malformed JSON. Please fix the file manually and re-run the command.

trans-unit.source: Start the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server.
trans-unit.target: 啟動 MCP (模型內容通訊協定) 伺服器。

trans-unit.source: Configuration completed with errors. Please fix the reported issues and re-run the command.
trans-unit.target: Configuration completed with errors. Please fix the reported issues and re-run the command.
